evidence_rows.reading: V1.10A opened as a one-off owner-led probe, not as the start of a new chain.
The probe result is bounded and explicit whether positive or negative; it does not justify automatic follow-on expansion.

interpretation: V1.10A has now produced a single bounded probe result for policy_followthrough cross-family breadth.
The branch stays below promotion and forbids auto-creation of V1.10B or broader replay.
The next legal step is a closure check only.
